glosses.en: end of work; time after work
glosses.es: fin de la jornada laboral; tiempo después del trabajo
glosses.fr: fin de la journée de travail; temps après le travail
glosses.it: fine della giornata lavorativa; tempo dopo il lavoro
glosses.zh-Hans: 下班; 下班后的时间
glosses.yue: 收工; 收工後嘅時間
glosses.ru: конец рабочего дня; время после работы
glosses.pt: fim do expediente; tempo após o trabalho
glosses.he: סוף יום העבודה; הזמן שאחרי העבודה
glosses.vi: tan làm; thời gian sau giờ làm
glosses.nl: einde van de werkdag; tijd na het werk
glosses.uk: кінець робочого дня; час після роботи
glosses.hi: कार्यदिवस का अंत; काम के बाद का समय
glosses.el: τέλος της εργασιακής ημέρας; χρόνος μετά τη δουλειά
glosses.id: akhir jam kerja; waktu setelah kerja
glosses.cs: konec pracovního dne; čas po práci
glosses.ja: 仕事終わり; 仕事の後の時間

translations.nl: Ik ben nu klaar met werken.
translations.hi: अब मेरा काम खत्म हो गया है.
translations.nb: Nå er jeg ferdig på jobb.
translations.sv: Nu är jag klar med jobbet.
translations.ja: もう仕事は終わりました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 1st sg); used idiomatically with 'Feierabend haben' to mean being off work.
Temporal adverb specifying the current time; modifies the verb.
Common noun (masc); direct object (accusative) in the idiom 'Feierabend haben'.

translations.pt: Hoje ele vai sair mais cedo.
translations.vi: Hôm nay anh ấy tan làm sớm.
translations.hi: वह आज जल्दी काम खत्म कर रहा है.
translations.id: Hari ini dia selesai lebih awal.
translations.da: Han har tidligt fri i dag.
translations.ja: 彼は今日は早く終わります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd sg); light-verb use with the noun 'Feierabend' to express finishing work.
Temporal adverb; part of the temporal setting, modifies the clause.
Adverb of time/degree; combines with 'heute' in the phrase 'heute früh' to modify the verb temporally.
Common noun (masc); direct object (accusative) of 'macht' in the light-verb construction 'Feierabend machen'.

sentences.target: Wir trinken nach Feierabend ein Bier.

translations.de: Wir trinken nach Feierabend ein Bier.
translations.en: We drink a beer after work.
translations.es: Tomamos una cerveza después del trabajo.
translations.fr: On prend une bière après le boulot.
translations.it: Beviamo una birra dopo il lavoro.
translations.yue: 我哋放工之後飲杯啤酒。
translations.pt: Nós bebemos uma cerveja depois do trabalho.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi uống bia sau giờ làm.
translations.nl: We drinken na het werk een biertje.
translations.hi: काम के बाद हम एक बीयर पीते हैं.
translations.el: Πίνουμε μια μπύρα μετά τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Vi tar en øl etter jobb.
translations.sv: Vi tar en öl efter jobbet.
translations.da: Vi drikker en øl efter arbejde.
translations.ja: 仕事のあとにビールを飲みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 1st pl); denotes the action.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Common noun (masc); object of the preposition 'nach' (dative singular), indicating the time reference.
Indefinite article; determiner for 'Bier' (accusative neuter singular).
Common noun (neuter); direct object of 'trinken' (accusative singular).

translations.en: At home, the workday is finally over.
translations.es: En casa, por fin se acabó el día de trabajo.
translations.fr: À la maison, la journée de travail est enfin finie.
translations.it: A casa, la giornata di lavoro è finalmente finita.
translations.zh-Hans: 在家里，工作终于结束了。
translations.yue: 喺屋企今日嘅工作終於完咗。
translations.pt: Em casa, o dia de trabalho finalmente acabou.
translations.he: בבית, יום העבודה סוף סוף נגמר.
translations.vi: Ở nhà, ngày làm việc cuối cùng cũng xong.
translations.ar: في البيت، انتهى يوم العمل أخيرًا.
translations.nl: Thuis is de werkdag eindelijk voorbij.
translations.hi: घर पर काम का दिन आखिरकार खत्म हो गया.
translations.pl: W domu dzień pracy wreszcie się skończył.
translations.el: Στο σπίτι, η μέρα εργασίας επιτέλους τελείωσε.
translations.id: Di rumah, hari kerja akhirnya selesai.
translations.ro: Acasă, ziua de lucru s-a terminat în sfârșit.
translations.cs: Doma je pracovní den konečně u konce.
translations.ja: 家で、仕事がやっと終わった。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; part of the fixed locative expression 'zu Hause', governing dative.
Common noun (dative singular) in the set phrase 'zu Hause'; denotes location.
Copular auxiliary (present, 3rd sg); links the subject/predicate nominal in the clause.
Adverb expressing speaker attitude/time; modifies the clause.
Common noun (masc); predicate nominal (nominative), functioning as the complement in this copular construction.
